jobs.title: Architect
jobs.content: <p>Benevity is the dominant corporate-purpose SaaS platform powering the workplace-giving-and-volunteering data model for Fortune 1000 companies worldwide.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Architect partners with Engineering & Product to ship the integrated giving / volunteering / grants-management platform across enterprise client cohorts.</p>

jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
jobs.content: <p>Benevity is the dominant corporate-purpose SaaS platform. The Sales team owns the B2B Fortune 1000 enterprise pipeline.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Enterprise Account Executive partners with Sales Engineering and Customer Success to grow the Benevity corporate-purpose platform footprint across Fortune 1000 cohorts.</p>
